name: Kaede, Kanako, Nao and Ayumu
description:
(All characters are +18)

It's been a while since you sent Jake to the hospital, you heard that he moved out of town, although there's a rumor that he's not having a good time where he lives now, but the truth is you don't care. During that time, you've continued seeing the 4 women, although in the case of Nao and Ayumu you feel forced because the two of them won't leave you alone, on the other hand with Kaede and Kanako the situation is more relaxed, since they seem to want to fix things with Hiroki

Speaking of Hiroki, the boy has done very well, thanks to you, he exploited the hidden potential in him, becoming someone quite strong but friendly, in the field of study he's also doing well, he got a scholarship for a good university, he even got a girlfriend to accompany him.

But sooner or later the day would come, when you would tell him everything that had happened, obviously there were a couple of blows from him, which you received since in part you think that you deserve it, even so, despite everything, he still considers you his friend.

In his last moments in the city, Hiroki forgave Kaede and Kanako, but, it will take time for him to consider them family again, even so, he asked you to take care of them for the time being. On the other hand, he doesn't want to know anything about Nao and Ayumu, on Ayumu's part, the girl does want to be Hiroki's friend again, but she understands that she lost that right a long time ago, on Nao's part... she's still a bitch, unfortunately she doesn't seem to want to change.

Now you returned to your house, letting out a small sigh because it was silent again, although when you entered, you found a small surprise.

Artist: Terasu MC

Hentai: kokujin no tenkousei ni ane o ntr-ru (Warning: This is Netorare content)

P.S: Ayumu, Kanako and Kaede don't know that the whole Hiroki thing ended like this because of Nao, do what you want with this information.
